svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 87), rgb(187, 103, 76)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 87), rgb(187, 103, 76));
fill: light-dark(rgb(20, 74, 70), rgb(148, 194, 191)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(20, 74, 70), rgb(148, 194, 191));
fill: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 87), rgb(187, 103, 76)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 87), rgb(187, 103, 76));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 343px; margin-left: 435px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #B85C3E; background-color: #FAF9F5;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#B85C3E, #cf8066); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#FAF9F5, #181714); white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 언제든 지시 쏘기

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 17px; margin-left: 530px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #141413;

div.div: Schedule + Dispatch — 자리 비운 사무실을 계속 돌리는 자동화

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 44px; margin-left: 530px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #87867F;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#87867F, #7b7a74); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 시간의 자동화(Schedule)와 공간의 확장(Dispatch)이 합쳐져 '사람 없이 도는 사무실'을 만드는 원리

④ 비서가 자동 출근
Skill 발동
→ Slack · Gmail · Project

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 485px; margin-left: 461px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #141413;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#141413, #dcdcdb); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
✗ 회차 건너뜀
자동 보충 없음
다음 알람까지 대기

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(120, 140, 93), rgb(113, 130, 90)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(95, 111, 74), rgb(139, 152, 120));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 485px; margin-left: 721px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⑤ 결과 회신
모바일 알림 · 메일 · Slack

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(20, 74, 70), rgb(148, 194, 191)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(14, 58, 53), rgb(166, 204, 199));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 615px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Dispatch 보조 경로
출장지 모바일에서 전화(지시) →
마지막 사용 PC에서 즉시 실행

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 730px; margin-left: 530px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #87867F;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#87867F, #7b7a74); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Schedule은 시각이 도달했을 때 PC가 켜져 있어야 발동하고, Dispatch는 언제든 모바일에서 지시를 보낼 수 있다. 둘이 합쳐야 자리를 비운 시간에도 사무실이 돈다.
